title: Gaia Plugin Configuration
description: Schema for the per-repository Gaia plugin configuration file (.gaia/config.json).

gaiaUser.description: GitHub username of the plugin user.

gaiaRegistryRef.description: URL to the Gaia registry repository.

scanPaths.description: Repository-relative paths to scan for skill references.

autoPromptCombinations.description: Whether to automatically prompt for detected combinations. Defaults to false.

lastScan.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last plugin scan.

id.description: Named skill ID in contributor/skill-name format.

sourceRef.description: URL to the source of the named skill in the registry.

sha256.description: SHA-256 hash of the skill file content for sync detection.

installedNamedSkills.description: Named skills installed in this repository.
